label: Service Agency

onboarding_questions.prompt: What 2-3 questions should the AI ask to qualify a new lead before assigning it to sales? (e.g. budget, timeline, project type)
Should new leads be auto-assigned round-robin to your sales team, or do you want to assign manually?
What's your typical turnaround time to send a quote after requirements are collected?

default_services_prompt: List the services you offer (e.g. Website Development, SEO, Branding) — one per message or comma-separated.
